title: Real or Generated: You Decide
modules: The Image That Broke the Internet
When the Words Sound Too Perfect
Create a Fake â Then Expose It
synopsis: A viral image has caused chaos at your school â but was it real? Work through a mystery where you examine photos, articles, and video clips, learning to spot the telltale signs of AI generation before the truth gets buried. The final challenge asks you to create a piece of AI content and then write the guide that helps others detect it.
rationale: With AI image, text, and video generation now freely accessible, students encounter synthetic media daily but lack the perceptual and analytical skills to distinguish it from authentic content.
learning_outcome: Students can apply detection strategies to identify likely AI-generated images, text, and video by recognizing characteristic artifacts, and can articulate why synthetic media requires skeptical evaluation.
